name: specscribe-delivery-spike
description: Story 6.6 THROWAWAY spike — npm-wrapper-around-native-binary proof (npx runs the self-contained .NET tool with no .NET SDK). Not published; the durable output is ADR 0006.
//: Real distribution would list per-RID native packages under optionalDependencies (the esbuild/Biome pattern), e.g. @specscribe/win-x64, @specscribe/linux-x64, @specscribe/darwin-arm64 — each carrying ONE ~34 MB gzipped binary so a user downloads only their platform. The wrapper itself stays a few KB.
